description: This Kotlin source file defines the main Application class 'SecureSampleApp', which initializes and manages critical components such as token storage, authentication management, and API client setup for a secure biometric authentication sample app. It includes configuration for safe mode, uncaught exception handling, and deferred network client creation.

classes.name: SecureSampleApp
classes.description: Main application class managing initialization, error handling, and safe mode configuration for secure biometric authentication.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the application, sets up exception handling, determines safe mode, and attempts to initialize core components.

methods.name: recordInitFailureIfEmpty
methods.description: Records an initialization failure message if one has not already been recorded, aiding in crash diagnostics.

methods.name: getOrCreateApiClient
methods.description: Lazily creates and returns the API client if not in preview safe mode.
